name: X-Golf Scottsdale
address: 8140 Hayden Rd Suite H-110, Scottsdale, AZ 85258
about: X-Golf Scottsdale is a golf simulation venue that offers a tech-driven indoor golfing experience. The facility provides a modern environment for golfers to play on virtual courses and practice their skills. Pricing and specific features are not detailed on the accessible portions of the website, but the venue appears to cater to both casual players and serious golfers looking for a year-round golfing option in Scottsdale.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golfing available year-round regardless of weather
Convenient location in Scottsdale for local and visiting golfers

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best fit and familiarity, though rental clubs may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified on the website. It's best to contact the venue directly to confirm their policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulation times can vary depending on the course and number of players in your bay, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Scottsdale kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Information regarding specific kid-friendly features or age policies is not available on the website.
